name: codex-cli
description: Codex CLI operations, automation, diagnostics, plugin and MCP lifecycle, session log forensics, and local environment actions.

interface.shortDescription: Operate, automate, debug, and inspect Codex CLI safely.
interface.longDescription: A Codex CLI operations pack for local CLI surface inspection, non-interactive exec and review automation, plugin marketplace and MCP server lifecycle work, doctor/debug/sandbox/app-server diagnostics, redacted session log forensics, and Codex app local environment actions.
capabilities: Local Codex CLI version, help, command, flag, and safety inspection
Non-interactive codex exec automation with cwd, sandbox, approval, JSONL, output schema, and last-message handling
Codex review commands for uncommitted changes, base-branch diffs, and commit review
Codex plugin marketplace visibility, install, removal, and cache-check workflows
Codex MCP server list, get, add, remove, login, logout, stdio, HTTP, bearer-token-env, and OAuth workflows
Codex doctor, debug, feature flag, sandbox denial, app-server, remote-control, and remote connection diagnostics
Redacted Codex rollout JSONL discovery, summaries, timelines, tool-call views, search, and log health checks
Codex app local environment.toml actions for Run, Test, Preview, dev server, browser, and simulator workflows
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me operate, automate, or debug the Codex CLI safely.
